title: abies pinsapo subsp. marocana
intro: Abies pinsapo subsp. marocana, also known as Moroccan fir or Atlas fir, is a subspecies of the Abies pinsapo tree native to Morocco. This evergreen conifer is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds, as well as its potential to aid in reducing fever and relieving respiratory issues. The health benefits of Abies pinsapo subsp. marocana include its ability to reduce inflammation, alleviate coughs and colds, and provide relief from stress and anxiety due to its calming effects. The plant can be prepared for use as a herbal remedy through steam distillation to extract essential oils or by making tea infusions from the needles and young shoots.
